tasks.label: Clear Python Cache
args: Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}' -Recurse -Directory -Filter '__pycache__' | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host '[OK] Python cache cleared'

tasks.label: Check Server And Run Bar Compare
Read Uvicorn Log
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem d:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\logs -Filter '*.log' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Desc | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.FullName; Get-Content $_.FullName -Tail 30 } > d:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\uvi_log.txt 2>&1

tasks.label: Recent Uvicorn Log
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem d:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\logs -Filter 'uvicorn*.log' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Desc | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ('File: ' + $_.FullName); Get-Content $_.FullName -Tail 50 } > d:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\uvi_recent.txt 2>&1

tasks.label: Kill Port 8000
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($c in $conns) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'All port 8000 processes killed'"

tasks.label: Wait and Health Check
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 18; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health' -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($r) { Write-Host 'SERVER UP:' ($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress) } else { Write-Host 'SERVER DOWN'; Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.log' -Tail 5 }"

tasks.label: Health Check v2
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host 'STATUS:' $r.StatusCode; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host 'ERROR:' $_.Exception.Message; Write-Host '--- LOG TAIL ---'; Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.log' -Tail 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"

tasks.label: Check Port and Log
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' | findstr LISTEN; echo '---LOG---'; Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.log' -Tail 15 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" > D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\check_status.txt 2>&1; Get-Content D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\check_status.txt

tasks.label: Wait 25s then Check Startup
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 25; Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.log' -Tail 20 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-File 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\startup_check.txt' -Encoding utf8; netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' >> 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\startup_check.txt' 2>&1"

tasks.label: Wait and Check Server Status
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 30; $log = Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log' -Tail 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $pid_ = Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $port = netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' | findstr LISTEN; [pscustomobject]@{PID=$pid_; Port=$port; LogTail=($log -join ' | ')} | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\srv_status.json' -Encoding utf8"

tasks.label: Server Status v3
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$port = (netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' | findstr LISTEN); $pid_ = (Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); $tail = (Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log' -Tail 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); $out = 'PORT=' + $port + ' PID=' + $pid_ + ' LOG=' + ($tail -join '||'); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\srv2.txt', $out)"

tasks.label: Wait 35s Check Server
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 35; $port = (netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' | findstr LISTEN); $pid_ = (Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); $tail = (Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log' -Tail 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); $out = 'PORT=[' + $port + '] PID=[' + $pid_ + '] LOG=[' + ($tail -join '||') + ']'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\srv3.txt', $out)"

tasks.label: Connection Check
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $pid_ = Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; echo ('CONN='+($conn|ConvertTo-Json -Compress -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)); echo ('PID_FILE='+$pid_) | Out-File D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\conn_check.txt -Encoding ascii"

tasks.label: Direct Uvicorn Start
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -ArgumentList '-m','uvicorn','backend.api.app:app','--host','0.0.0.0','--port','8000','--log-level','info' -WorkingDirectory 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.log' -RedirectStandardError 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log'; echo $proc.Id | Out-File D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid -Encoding ascii; echo ('Started PID:' + $proc.Id)"

tasks.label: After 30s Status
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 30; $pid_ = Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid' -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $port = netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' | findstr LISTEN; $tail4 = Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log' -Tail 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; echo $port; echo ('PID='+$pid_); $tail4 | Out-File 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\after30s.txt' -Encoding ascii; echo $port >> 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\after30s.txt'; echo ('PID='+$pid_) >> 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\temp_analysis\after30s.txt'"

tasks.label: Force Start Uvicorn
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn = $null; try { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop } catch {}; if ($conn) { 'PORT_BUSY_PID=' + $conn.OwningProcess } else { 'PORT_FREE'; $p = Start-Process -FilePath 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\scripts\run_uvicorn.bat' -ArgumentList '"D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.venv\Scripts\python.exe"','"D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2"','"D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.log"','"D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log"' -WorkingDirectory 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 2; 'STARTED PID=' + $p.Id; $p.Id | Out-File 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid' -Encoding ascii }"

tasks.label: Wait 35s Then Check
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 35; $lines = (Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log' -Tail 6 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -join '|'; $port = (netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' | findstr LISTEN) -join ' '; $pid2 = Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid' -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Add-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\check.txt' ('PORT='+$port+' PID='+$pid2+' LOG='+$lines)"

tasks.label: Check After 40s
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 40; $lc = (Get-Content 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn_err.log' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Count; $pf = Test-Path 'D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\uvicorn.pid'; $port = netstat -ano 2>$null | Select-String ':8000.*LISTEN'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('D:\bybit_strategy_tester_v2\.run\chk.txt','LC='+$lc+' PF='+$pf+' PORT='+$port)"

tasks.label: Kill Port 8000 v2
tasks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pids = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach($p in $pids){ Write-EventLog -LogName Application -Source 'Application' -EntryType Information -EventId 1 -Message ('Killing PID '+$p) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; taskkill /F /PID $p 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 3; $still = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; Write-EventLog -LogName Application -Source 'Application' -EntryType Information -EventId 2 -Message ('Still on 8000: '+$still) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"

tasks.label: Kill 8000 CMD
tasks.command: FOR /F "tokens=5" %P IN ('netstat -ano ^| findstr ":8000 " ^| findstr LISTEN') DO taskkill /F /PID %P
